summary: Test suite covers main features (XML/JSON parsing, aggregation, flaky detection) but has critical gaps. Bats tests run script directly rather than through workflow per requirements ('all testing goes through the pipeline'). Act harness tests only 1 scenario when task mandates 'every single test case must execute through act'—doesn't test error cases or edge cases via CI. Missing coverage: malformed input, boundary values on numeric fields, special characters in names, empty result files, missing JSON fields. Limited rigor on edge cases; mostly happy-path focused. Fixture files referenced but not defined in provided code. Would catch regressions in primary workflow but miss many failure modes.
